Home›Practice areas›Personal Injury

Georgia, statewide

Personal Injury Lawyers in Georgia

1,305 listings statewide

Compare top rated personal injury lawyers across Georgia. We list 1,305 injury & accidents practices, both established law firms and solo attorneys, with ratings, reviews, and direct contact. Georgia's statute of limitations for most personal injury claims is two years from the date of the injury (O.C.G.A. § 9-3-33). Most personal injury lawyers work on contingency, so you pay no fee unless they recover money for you.

Frequently asked questions

How many personal injury lawyers are in Georgia?

Our directory lists 1,305 personal injury lawyers across Georgia, ranked by rating and reviews.

What should I know before hiring a personal injury lawyer in Georgia?

Georgia's statute of limitations for most personal injury claims is two years from the date of the injury (O.C.G.A. § 9-3-33). Most personal injury lawyers work on contingency, so you pay no fee unless they recover money for you.

Who is a top personal injury lawyer in Georgia?

Broadnax & Martin P.C. in Stockbridge is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 236 reviews.

Attorney advertising. Georgia Lawyer Directory is an independent directory, not a law firm or lawyer referral service, and does not provide legal advice or endorse any attorney. Listings marked Premium are paid placements; rankings reflect ratings and verified reviews and are not for sale. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome. Contacting an attorney through this site does not create an attorney client relationship.
